channel.title: PeatFree on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in PeatFree on Nature Works

item.title: Peat Free Nurseries
item.description:
Does your nursery use peat-free compost? A list of nurseries that do, compiled by Nic Wilson 🙏

Using peat-based compost contributes to #ClimateBreakdown and wildlife habitat loss. Best thing you can do is use a peat-free compost (such as Sylvagrow, FertileFibre, Dalefoot etc) and buy your plants from a nursery that use peat-free compost. http://localhost:1313/blog/peat-free-nurseries/

item.title: PeatFree Climate Emergency
item.description:
Using peat-based compost contributes to the destruction of wildlife habitats and the release of vast amounts of greenhouse gases. Profit, convenience & ignorance; it is the story of Climate Breakdown.

The peat extraction industry is a microcosm of the wider Climate Emergency. http://localhost:1313/blog/peatfree-climate-emergency/
